title: Search the entire corpus
asA: user with a large note corpus
iWant: to search across all my notes by free text
soThat: I can find an old note even when I don't remember where I filed it

acceptanceCriteria.description: Search returns relevant notes for a free-text query
acceptanceCriteria.then: the top 10 results return within 10 seconds with the match highlighted

acceptanceCriteria.description: Empty query yields the recent-notes list
acceptanceCriteria.when: the user opens the search surface
acceptanceCriteria.then: the most recently edited 20 notes are listed
